_comment: Copy relevant values in. The extension loads answers from chrome.storage if present, otherwise this file. 'description' helps the LLM match fields; 'sensitive: true' forces manual review and never auto-fills.

portfolio.description: Personal website, portfolio, or GitHub URL

authorized_to_work.description: Are you legally authorized to work in this country? yes/no

needs_sponsorship.description: Will you now or in the future require visa sponsorship? yes/no

visa_status.description: Current immigration / work status, e.g. Citizen, Permanent Resident, H-1B, F-1 OPT

non_compete.description: Are you bound by any non-compete agreement? usually no

start_date.description: Earliest available start date or notice period

over_18.description: Are you at least 18 years old? yes/no

drivers_license.description: Do you have a valid driver's license? yes/no

years_experience.description: Total years of relevant work experience

how_heard.description: How did you hear about this role/company?
